texto: It is great to add some glamour to the food industry, like television shows have done for the food world and inspiring people to work in the industry. The flip side of that is unfortunately people think that after they get their qualifications, they get their invitation to compete on 'Top Chef.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Curtis Stone: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “It is great to add some glamour to the food industry, like television shows have done for the foo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, work, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e trabalho.

texto: In my travels, I also noticed that kids in Thailand like spicy food, and kids in India love curry. I'm hoping to introduce my son, Hudson, to lots of veggies and spices when he's young. I say that before he's started on solid foods, so it could be easier in theory than practice!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Curtis Stone: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “In my travels, I also noticed that kids in Thailand like spicy food, and kids in India love curry…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, son pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e son.

texto: I always think if you have to cook once, it should feed you twice. If you're going to make a big chicken and vegetable soup for lunch on Monday, you stick it in the refrigerator and it's also for Wednesday's dinner.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Curtis Stone sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “I always think if you have to cook once, it should feed you twice. If you're going to make a big …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, wednesday, lunch, útil em momentos de segunda-feira e lunch.

texto: These days I travel so much it's hard to get into a routine. When I'm on the road, I tend to use hotel gyms. When I'm home in L.A., I like to hike and hit the surf. All in all, I try to keep a balanced diet and exercise routine, which has stood me in good stead to date.

texto: I love coming home to Melbourne. The first thing I do is have a coffee. It's just so much better here than anywhere else. It's better than in Italy and I travel a lot. I crave it.
explicacao: Citação de Curtis Stone sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I love coming home to Melbourne. The first thing I do is have a coffee. It's just so much better …” articula amor, love, home em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como viagem e home.

texto: I thought I'd love to be a gardener because I grew up with a vegetable garden and I love being close to the Earth and growing things. At my home in L.A., I have a great garden and I grow all kinds of things. I even have a worm farm! The worms help create organic compost out of kitchen scraps.
